phase_name: Launcher command fix + Claude Code visual simplification brief

completed_tasks.name: Commit command surface hardening and Phase 6 raw-mode decision
Add guide hint engine with implemented and reserved triggers
Wire home_empty, first_shortlist, and decision_complete hints
Add guide and shell-renderer hint coverage
Make advertised launcher commands parse consistently
Create Claude Code frontend-skill visual simplification brief

remaining_tasks.name: Commit and push launcher command fix plus visual brief
Ask Claude Code to implement the visual simplification brief with frontend-skill

human_actions_pending.action: Send visual brief to Claude Code
human_actions_pending.context: Frontend/visual implementation is intentionally delegated to Claude Code with frontend-skill.

decisions.decision: Skip full raw-mode migration for compare/detail/clarify/launcher prompts.
decisions.rationale: Current enquirer prompts plus slash-command interception satisfy the primary UX need; raw-mode line editing adds cross-terminal and multi-byte risks.

decisions.decision: Skip Phase 7 workflow/domain state-machine work for this CLI upgrade chain.
decisions.rationale: Phase 7 was conditional on Phase 6 proving raw-mode migration necessary.

decisions.decision: Treat blocked guide trigger as reserved, not a current integration gap.
decisions.rationale: No blocked/no-results guide call site is part of this Phase 8 slice; implemented triggers are home_empty, first_shortlist, and decision_complete.

next_action: Commit and push the verified launcher command fix plus visual simplification brief, then hand visual implementation to Claude Code.

verification.vitest: Focused CLI suite — 8 files, 168 tests passed

context_notes: Phase 8 guide hints shipped, but user feedback says mascot and visual system are not yet sufficient. This batch fixes command correctness and creates a Claude Code visual implementation brief rather than doing the frontend pass here.
